summary: Mephi and a group of humans are trying to reach the village of the Snow People, but they are being pursued by a powerful warrior. Mephi is struggling with his own powers, which he believes will kill him if he uses them fully. He is determined to reach his ancestors' house on the cliff, where he hopes to find answers and restore honor to his family's name.
key_moments: Mephi and the humans are ambushed by a powerful warrior
Mephi struggles with using his powers, fearing they will kill him if he uses them fully
The group decides to team up and face the warrior together
